accepted_risks: Reviewer is the same agent as the extractor; independent re-review is recommended before the skill is switched to active.
Only single-channel text extraction was performed; rendered-page dual pass was not completed by an independent reviewer.
Syllabus content section (p.33-64) was sampled rather than fully audited page-by-page.
SL/HL and AHL boundaries within topics were noted but not fully verified.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at are not verified in local archive metadata.

findings.issue: Syllabus content section was sampled across Structure and Reactivity strands; full understandings/applications/skills lists for every sub-topic were not extracted.
findings.required_fix: Builder to use syllabus outline/roadmap as scaffold and re-sample specific sub-topics as needed for topics.json.

findings.issue: SL/HL and AHL scope markers exist within each topic; text extraction did not always clearly tag boundary transitions.
findings.required_fix: Builder to verify SL/HL/AHL boundaries against original PDF before finalising topic scope.
